chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 367 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.5542/2021 (151 CPC) 15-09-2021 Mr. Hamid Ali Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Pursuant to order dated 05-08-2021, respondent’s Counsel has filed a statement along with two original cheques No.32327645 dated 15-09-2021 for Rs.3,00,000/- (Rupees three lac) and No.32327646 dated 10-10-2021 for Rs.3,33,071/- (Rupees three lac thirty three thousand and seventy one); same are taken on record. The petitioner shall approach the Additional Registrar of this Court, who shall hand over the said cheques to the petitioner after proper verification. The amount payable stands settled, therefore, listed application has served its purpose and is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
